## Trust boundaries (required for gameplay/economy changes)

<!-- Delete this section if UI/docs-only. -->

- [ ] N/A — no remotes, stats, persistence, or monetization impact
- [ ] RemoteEvent / RemoteFunction handlers reviewed for server validation
- [ ] Stat/inventory changes go through StatsService
- [ ] Purchase/receipt changes go through MonetizationService
- [ ] Tested in Studio (describe below)
